violations.message: Error types are appropriate (not generic Error for everything): All errors are wrapped in generic Error objects; no use of more specific error types (e.g., custom error classes or built-in error types like TypeError or FileNotFoundError).
violations.details: Error handling is robust and descriptive, but only generic Error is used for all cases.
